title: SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES - 211info
text: LINN BENTON LINCOLN EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support for children with vision impairment, hearing impairment, severe orthopedic impairment, and autism spectrum disorder. Collaborates with component school districts and programs to provide specialized support. Services includes consultation, assessment, instruction, and adaptive or specialized materials and equipment, as well as assistance with IEP development and implementation. 905 4th Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Must contact school's special education director to start the referral process and determine eligibility. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 812-2770 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 812-2770 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred through resident school district. Teachers and other school staff may also make referrals. Call for information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Referral documents LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOL INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - STUDENT AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION/EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINN BENTON LINCOLN EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
